channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will allow Ukraine to produce Patriot missiles
item.description: President Trump said Wednesday the U.S. will grant Ukraine a production license for Patriot missile interceptors for defense.

item.title: How Democrats could replace a Maine Senate nominee if Platner withdraws
item.description: Democrats have a short window to replace candidate Graham Platner on the ballot if he exits following a sexual assault allegation.

item.title: Potential earnings from a 4.20% CD account
item.description: CD accounts offering 4.20% interest are widely available. Here is the potential return.

item.title: White House unveils 'Freedom Fuel' station with $3.47 gas
item.description: The Freedom Fuel Network sells gasoline more than 30 cents below the national average.
